title: Tinkers of the past
description: An mod that adds compatibility with compatibiilty with Tinker's Construct and Ripples of the past
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf098fef806969fa81cfc39d3397ae40f9672ed5_0.webp)
# About
Tinkers of the past is bridge add-on between [Tinkers Construct](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-construct) and [Ripples of the past](https://modrinth.com/mod/ripples-of-the-past/), adding 2 new traits and materials
## Material
- Meteoric Alloy: Material obtained by melting Ripples of the past meteoric core. Meteor Virus trait
- Stand Arrow Allow: Material that is product of combining melted gold and melted meteoric alloy. Stand Arrow trait
## Traits
- Meteor Virus: Gives virus to the enemies that are hit
- Stand Arrow: Makes the weapons work as Stand Arrow
